acceptance_criteria: The validation readiness-evaluation workflow exits successfully.
The validation gate records passing evidence in status/readiness.json.
completion_signals: Validation evaluation evidence is recorded under eval/history and linked from status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Validation reports schema or contract failures that the current task scope cannot resolve safely.
tasks.summary: Run the validation readiness-evaluation workflow and capture canonical validation evidence.

acceptance_criteria: The benchmark readiness-evaluation workflow exits successfully.
Inherited benchmark gates update from not_run to pass or waived.
completion_signals: Benchmark evaluation evidence records results in eval/latest/index.json.
Required benchmark gates advance to pass or waived in status/readiness.json.
escalation_conditions: Benchmark output fails to update readiness or eval state through the existing bounded surfaces.
tasks.summary: Run the benchmark readiness-evaluation workflow after validation passes.

acceptance_criteria: The build-pack records the exact artifact fields required for the first shallow surface map before command implementation starts.
The artifact contract keeps observed facts, tentative classification, and unknowns distinct.
completion_signals: The first-wave machine-readable artifact contract is described in a pack-local spec or contract note.
The current pack-local objective, backlog, and work-state all point at the shallow surface map as the first product slice.
escalation_conditions: The contract expands into full dependency mapping or deep subsystem interpretation before the first artifact shape is stable.
The artifact cannot distinguish observed evidence from tentative inference.
tasks.summary: Confirm the first-wave shallow surface map artifact contract before implementing discovery commands.

acceptance_criteria: The build-pack can gather a first read-only shallow surface map from the live Rocky 8 host and appliance runtime.
The first pass stays intentionally shallow and stops after one machine-readable map plus one operator-reviewable summary.
Any imported ASMS documentation context remains a supplementary hint layer rather than replacing runtime evidence.
completion_signals: One first-wave artifact exists for the machine-readable shallow surface map.
One first-wave operator-reviewable summary exists and derives from the map.
The first pass names one or two deeper seams worth investigating next.
escalation_conditions: The implementation starts drifting into deep Java or dependency analysis before the first shallow artifact is accepted.
The first pass cannot stay read-only or bounded to host-and-runtime observable surfaces.
tasks.summary: Implement the first shallow read-only surface map slice for the ADF successor build pack, with supplementary ASMS doc-pack hints allowed only as ranking and naming support.
